metrics.name: protheus_health_slo_level
metrics.help: SLO alert level (ok=0,warn=1,critical=2,unknown=-1).

metrics.name: protheus_health_slo_warn_count
metrics.help: Count of SLO checks at warn level.

metrics.name: protheus_health_slo_critical_count
metrics.help: Count of SLO checks at critical level.

metrics.name: protheus_health_slo_failed_checks_total
metrics.help: Count of failed SLO checks in selected window.

metrics.name: protheus_health_verification_pass_rate
metrics.help: Receipt verification pass rate from autonomy health checks.

metrics.name: protheus_branch_queue_open_count
metrics.help: Current queue open count from branch health snapshot.

metrics.name: protheus_branch_policy_holds_count
metrics.help: Current policy hold count from branch health snapshot.

metrics.name: protheus_observed_autonomy_runs
metrics.help: Observed autonomy runs in selected health window.

metrics.name: protheus_workflow_executor_slo_pass
metrics.help: Workflow executor SLO pass flag (1=pass,0=fail).

metrics.name: protheus_workflow_executor_execution_success_rate
metrics.help: Workflow executor measured execution success rate.

metrics.name: protheus_workflow_executor_queue_drain_rate
metrics.help: Workflow executor measured queue drain rate.

metrics.name: protheus_workflow_executor_live_zero_selection_streak
metrics.help: Consecutive non-dry live executor runs with zero workflows selected.

metrics.name: protheus_workflow_executor_live_zero_selection_warn_streak
metrics.help: Warning threshold for live zero-selection streak.

metrics.name: protheus_execution_reliability_slo_pass
metrics.help: Execution reliability parity SLO pass flag (1=pass,0=fail).

metrics.name: protheus_execution_reliability_success_rate
metrics.help: Rolling execution reliability success rate.

metrics.name: protheus_execution_reliability_queue_drain_rate
metrics.help: Rolling execution reliability queue drain rate.

metrics.name: protheus_execution_reliability_ttf_p95_ms
metrics.help: Rolling p95 time-to-first-execution in milliseconds.

metrics.name: protheus_execution_reliability_zero_shipped_streak_days
metrics.help: Consecutive zero-shipped day streak from reliability tracker.

metrics.name: protheus_ci_baseline_guard_pass
metrics.help: CI baseline guard pass flag (1=pass,0=fail).

metrics.name: protheus_ci_baseline_guard_streak_target_met
metrics.help: CI baseline streak target met flag (1=met,0=not_met).

metrics.name: protheus_ci_baseline_streak_days
metrics.help: Current consecutive daily green CI streak.

metrics.name: protheus_ci_baseline_target_days
metrics.help: Target daily green CI streak length.

metrics.name: protheus_ci_baseline_streak_ratio
metrics.help: CI streak ratio against target streak.

metrics.name: protheus_observability_snapshot_timestamp_seconds
metrics.help: Unix timestamp of observability metrics snapshot.
